directions_tried.name: Phase 0: Decomposition Audit
directions_tried.outcome: Identified Chebyshev level-set estimate as SINGLE improvable step. 4 of 5 steps provably sharp. 3 Track B directions closed.

directions_tried.name: Track B: Chebyshev level-set (computational DNS)
directions_tried.outcome: Tightness ~3-5× but k-independent. No U_{k-1}^{-δ} scaling. Constant slack does NOT improve β.

directions_tried.name: Track B: Chebyshev level-set (analytical) + Track A universality
directions_tried.outcome: Chebyshev NOT independently improvable (circular with regularity). Universal formula β=1+s/n. SQG commutator mechanism.

directions_tried.name: Track B: Commutator / compensated compactness (Route 3)
directions_tried.outcome: 3 independent obstructions. Commutator part has good high-freq regularity but div-error remainder negates it.

directions_tried.name: Track B: Frequency-localized De Giorgi (LP decomposition)
directions_tried.outcome: 4 independent lines: spectral shift, growing I_hi, Bernstein penalty, analytical chain. CZ optimal freq-by-freq.

directions_tried.name: Track B: Non-CZ pressure handling
directions_tried.outcome: 3 routes: IBP β=1 (worse), H¹/BMO β=4/3 (same), CRW β≤1. β=4/3 is tool-independent.

directions_tried.name: Phase 2: Adversarial review
directions_tried.outcome: All 7 closures survive. 3 combination attacks fail. 15 papers confirm no published β>4/3. Claims 1-4 publishable.

directions_tried.name: Track B: SDP Chebyshev sharpness formalization
directions_tried.outcome: Chebyshev PROVABLY tight: constant field u=(c,0,0) achieves ratio→1. All 4 De Giorgi steps tight. β=4/3 SHARP.

explorations_completed.goal_summary: Line-by-line decomposition audit of Vasseur (2007) Prop 3
explorations_completed.key_finding: Chebyshev at truncation level set is the SINGLE potentially improvable step.

explorations_completed.goal_summary: DNS measurement of level-set distribution vs Chebyshev bound
explorations_completed.key_finding: Tightness ~3-5× but k-independent. Constant slack does NOT improve β.

explorations_completed.goal_summary: Analytical Chebyshev improvement survey + model PDE universality test
explorations_completed.key_finding: Chebyshev NOT independently improvable. Universal formula β=1+s/n.

explorations_completed.goal_summary: Commutator / compensated compactness analysis of De Giorgi bottleneck
explorations_completed.key_finding: Route 3 CLOSED. 3 obstructions. Commutator good at high-freq but div-error negates.

explorations_completed.goal_summary: Frequency-localized De Giorgi via Littlewood-Paley decomposition
explorations_completed.key_finding: LP CANNOT improve β. CZ optimal freq-by-freq. Bernstein structural.

explorations_completed.goal_summary: Non-CZ pressure handling via IBP, H¹/BMO, CRW
explorations_completed.key_finding: No non-CZ route improves β. β=4/3 is TOOL-INDEPENDENT.

explorations_completed.goal_summary: Adversarial review of comprehensive obstruction and novel claims
explorations_completed.key_finding: All closures survive. Claims 1-4 publishable. SDP formalization recommended.

explorations_completed.goal_summary: SDP formalization of Chebyshev sharpness under NS constraints
explorations_completed.key_finding: Chebyshev PROVABLY tight. Constant div-free field extremizer. β=4/3 SHARP.
